name: IdsEdwDntlCatPaymtDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_query AS (SELECT D.DNTL_CAT_PAYMT_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, D.DNTL_CAT_PAYMT_CMPNT_ID, D.DNTL_CAT_ID, D.DNTL_CAT_SK, D.DNTL_CAT_RULE_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DNTL_CAT_PAYMT D LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_transform AS (SELECT cte_query.DNTL_CAT_PAYMT_SK AS DNTL_CAT_PAYMT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_query.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_query.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_query.DNTL_CAT_PAYMT_CMPNT_ID, cte_query.DNTL_CAT_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_query.DNTL_CAT_SK, cte_query.DNTL_CAT_RULE_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_query) SELECT DNTL_CAT_PAYMT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, DNTL_CAT_PAYMT_CMPNT_ID, DNTL_CAT_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DNTL_CAT_SK, DNTL_CAT_RULE_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_transform
